story: As an Active Recorder, I want to split a single receipt into multiple categorized expense lines on one screen, so that I can accurately record mixed-category shopping trips without multiple separate entries.
acceptance_criteria: User can add multiple split lines on the same entry screen without navigating away
The remainder auto-calculates as the user adds split amounts
All split lines are saved as separate rows sharing the same receipt_group_id
The timeline visually groups receipt splits together
